name: Ranorex
description: Ranorex — GUI test automation tool for web, desktop, and mobile apps using XPath-based object recognition.

seo.title: Ranorex — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Ranorex: Ranorex — GUI test automation tool for web, desktop, and mobile apps using XPath-based object recognition.

when_to_use: GUI test automation for Windows desktop application
XPath-based object recognition for complex UI testing
Cross-browser automated testing for web applications
Record-and-replay test creation for QA teams
Mobile app test automation with device simulation

cons: Not an API management tool at all
review.verdict: Serious GUI automation suite for Windows shops, but miscategorized here and aging against Playwright for web.
review.best_for: Windows enterprises automating legacy desktop apps
review.not_for: Web-first teams or mac/linux development shops
